headline: Stocks to Watch Thursday Recap: Delta Air Lines, General Motors, Exxon
summary: ↘️ Delta Air Lines (DAL), United Airlines (UAL): Both airline stocks closed lower on the prospect of a longer-lasting Iran war. The longer the conflict goes on, the longer jet-fuel prices will likely stay elevated.

headline: Asia-Pacific markets mostly rise in Easter trade on hopes for Hormuz reopening
summary: South Korea's Kospi led gains in the region while Japan's Nikkei 225 also opened higher. The Australian and Hong Kong markets were closed for the Easter weekend.

headline: Stocks to Watch Thursday: Apple, Exxon, Delta Air Lines
summary: ↘️ Apple (AAPL), Nvidia (NVDA), Tesla (TSLA): The three tech stocks were the most heavily traded S&P 500 components before the U.S. bell. All fell. ↘️ Delta Air Lines (DAL), United Airlines (UAL): Both airline stocks were down more than 3% premarket on the prospect of a longer-lasting war.
